code:
import io
import string

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    done = true
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut found = false
    mut pos = 0
    while not found and i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          found = true
          pos = i
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if found and pos > 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, pos)
      let value = string.substring(line, pos + 1, n)
      println("#{key}:#{value}")
    end
  end
end
